channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattress and lawn mower, 17th May
item.description:
Dumped mattress and lawnmower. Been here for 2 weeks. Causing issues for wheel chair users and prams etc. Also found it in the middle of the road causing an obstruction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Driving Hazard / growth around tree, 17th May
item.description:
The growth around the tree which is on the bend of the road restricts visibility to the road users. Cars come around the corner sometimes at speed and can’t see clearly down the road . Also the entering and exiting peoples drive on tree side is very restricted.. especially the houses directly beside and after the tree .. The lower growth needs cutting please :)) thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Willersley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bus stop/shelter needs cleaning, 17th May
item.description:
I was just sitting in this bus stop, and it looks very dirty - see photos I’ve attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201, Shooters Hill Road, Kidbrooke, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping by residents, 17th May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish left on ground sgain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The street poorly sweeped, 17th May
item.description:
Street as poorly sweeped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Carlton Parade, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Harvist Road/Milman Road - Fly-Posts, 17th May

Harvist Road/Milman Road - Fly-Posts

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London

item.title: Large road hole just appeared over the last week., 17th May
item.description:
Hole has appeared and it will get worse if not fixed soon. Part of council pathway before private area. Please fix it asap before more vans and cars make it worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gainsborough Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags covering wall in park, 17th May
item.description:
Please clean this all off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish bags all over pavement and road., 17th May
item.description:
Foxes have got into bags of rubbish bags that were piled on top of green wheelie bins at the side of Love Walk Cafe and now the rubbish is spread all across the pavement and road in Love Walk. Location is: at the side of Love Walk Cafe at the Denmark Hill end of Love Walk SE5

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London

item.title: Graffiti on bench in park, 17th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jocelyn Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Outside 50 park village east (Silsoe house), 17th May
item.description:
Utility data cupboard vandalized. Door has been broken off
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Village East, Fitzrovia, Greater London

item.title: Dead adult coot in main lake., 17th May
item.description:
There was a dead coot floating in the lake, just near the railings, adjacent to the rose garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mass Flytipping next to the gym, 17th May
item.description:
Please remove all this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jocelyn Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement on right hand side of Winscombe Street, 17th May
item.description:
Overgrown ivy from a property in Chester Toad is encroaching onto the public pavement and significantly narrowing pedestrian access. In places it is covering the walkway and creating a potential trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bertram Street, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
